channel.title: Dimension 20 Animated
channel.description: Latest releases from Dimension 20 Animated on Dropout.tv

item.title: Operation Slippery Puppet
item.description:
At the Battle of the Brands, Sundry Sidney enacts a devious plan. Animated by Trevor Dedekind and Alex Dron.

Duration: 02:46

Tags: Dimension 20 Animated, Dimension 20, A Starstruck Odyssey, animation, role playing, space, fights, battles, bombs, emily axford, ally beardsley, brian murphy, zac oyama, siobhan thompson, lou wilson, brennan lee mulligan, yukfoo animation, trevor dedekind, alex dron
